WITH order_toppings AS (
  SELECT 
    t.topping_name,
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.toppings, 1, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
  FROM pizza_recipes r
  JOIN pizza_toppings t ON t.topping_id = CAST(SUBSTR(r.toppings, 1, 1) AS INTEGER)

    t.topping_name,

WITH recipe_toppings AS (
  SELECT 
    pr.pizza_id,
    CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 1, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
  FROM pizza_recipes pr
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    pr.pizza_id,
    CAST(SUBSTR(pr.toppings, 3, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
  FROM pizza_recipes pr
  WHERE LENGTH(pr.toppings) > 1

WITH RECURSIVE recipe_toppings AS (
  SELECT 
    pizza_id,
    toppings,
    1 AS pos,
    CAST(SUBSTR(toppings, 1, 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
  FROM pizza_recipes
  WHERE LENGTH(toppings) >= 1
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    pizza_id,
    toppings,
    pos + 2,
    CAST(SUBSTR(toppings, pos + 1, 1) AS INTEGER)
  FROM recipe_toppings
  WHERE pos + 1 <= LENGTH(toppings) AND SUBSTR(toppings, pos + 1, 1) != ','
),

WITH order_toppings AS (
  SELECT 
    t.topping_name,
    CAST(SUBSTR(r.toppings, 1 + 2 * (n - 1), 1) AS INTEGER) AS topping_id
  FROM pizza_recipes r
  JOIN pizza_toppings t ON t.topping_id = CAST(SUBSTR(r.toppings, 1 + 2 * (n - 1), 1) AS INTEGER)
  CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 
    UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 
    UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10
  ) nums
